descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 to take 3-2 series lead in Centennial Cup Western final.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey scored two goals to lead the Richmond Sockeyes to a 5-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in a Centennial Cup playoff game played late Sunday night. The win gave Richmond a 3-2 lead in the best-of-seven Western Canada Tier 2 junior final, with the sixth game scheduled in Richmond that evening.

attribution.headline: Eyes go up 3-2 in Tier 2 tussle
